jobs.title: Senior Developer Job Network International
jobs.description: Looking for an IT job in Kenya? Network International is hiring a Senior Developer skilled in full-stack development (PHP, Go, Node.js, Vue.js), API integration, cloud infrastructure (AWS), and Agile team mentorship.
responsibilities: Lead and mentor a team of developers, providing technical guidance and support.
Review and analyze code, ensuring adherence to best practices and standards.
Design and develop software applications using modern programming languages and frameworks.
Integrate and optimize APIs, databases, and development tools to enhance system performance.
Collaborate with cross-functional teams to understand business requirements and translate them into technical solutions.
Conduct code reviews and provide constructive feedback to improve code quality.
requirements: Minimum of 5 years’ professional software development experience, including experience building and supporting production-grade systems.
Strong experience developing software applications using modern programming languages, frameworks, APIs, databases, and development tools.
Experience in system design, software architecture, integrations, database design, and cloud or enterprise platforms is desirable.
Experience working in Agile, Scrum, or other iterative software delivery environments.
Proven ability to mentor developers, review code, guide technical decisions, and support team delivery.

jobs.title: ICT Officer Job Beachfront Vipingo
jobs.description: IT Jobs. Beachfront Vipingo Jobs. Looking for an ICT job in Kenya? Beachfront Vipingo is hiring an ICT Officer to manage the organization’s ICT systems and ensure the smooth operation of technology services. The role is based in Mombasa and experience in ICT support is required.
responsibilities: Install, configure and maintain computer hardware, software, printers and other ICT equipment.
Provide first-line technical support to users and resolve hardware, software and network-related issues promptly.
Monitor and maintain the Company’s network infrastructure, internet connectivity and wireless systems.
Administer user accounts, passwords, access rights and system permissions.
Install, configure and update operating systems, business applications and security software.
Perform routine system maintenance, software updates and security patches.
requirements: Bachelor’s Degree in Information Technology, Computer Science, Information Systems, Software Engineering, Computer Engineering or a related field from a recognized institution.
Minimum of three (3) years’ relevant experience in ICT support, systems administration or network administration, preferably in the hospitality industry.
Experience supporting ERP systems, Property Management Systems (PMS), Point of Sale (POS) systems and other hospitality applications will be an added advantage.
Proficiency in Microsoft Office applications, Windows Server environments, Active Directory and network administration.
jobs.howToApply: Interested candidates should submit:

jobs.title: IT Support Officer Job (70-90K)
jobs.description: IT Jobs. Corporate Staffing Services is recruiting an IT Support Officer position for a client in the construction industry. The salary for the role is Ksh 70,000 – 90,000 monthly. Proficiency in network management, system administration, and end-user support is required.
responsibilities: Manage network & systems, firewall and storage related issues of the company
Provide end-user support and training for hardware and software.
Install, configure and provide technical support to workstations, software, communication services, network printing, scanner, biometric system, CCTV etc.
Maintain and provide IT support and troubleshooting for end users.
Perform system administration and maintenance tasks including data protection/backup and disaster recovery sites.
Deploy, manage and troubleshoot user workstation and computer equipment
requirements: At least a Diploma / Bachelor’s Degree in Computer Science / Information Technology or equivalent
At least 3-5 years of working experience in the related field
Knowledge of TCP/IP and Windows system
Experience in construction industry will be added advantage
Good understanding and experience of Windows operating system, office365, Sharepoint and Autodesk
jobs.howToApply: If you are up to the challenge and possess the necessary qualifications and experience; please send your CV only quoting the job title on the email subject (IT Support Officer) tojobs@corporatestaffing.co.kebefore21stJuly 2026

jobs.title: Principal AI Engineer Job FinSense Africa
jobs.description: IT Jobs. FinSense Africa Jobs. Looking for an IT job in Kenya? FinSense Africa is recruiting a Principal AI Engineer position. Proficiency in AI/ML platforms, enterprise architecture, and AI solution delivery is required.
requirements: A Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Software Engineering or related field (a Master’s degree in AI/ML or Data Science is an added advantage), with 8+ years in software engineering or architecture – including at least 3–5 years designing AI, data or cloud architectures at scale and leading the technical design of complex AI/ML platforms or datadriven products.

jobs.title: Cyber Security Analyst (DevSecOps) Job FinSense Africa
jobs.description: IT Jobs. FinSense Africa Jobs. Looking for an IT job in Kenya? FinSense Africa is recruiting a Cyber Security Analyst (DevSecOps) position. Proficiency in DevSecOps, application security, and vulnerability assessment is required.
responsibilities: Work with scrum and project teams to ensure that security requirements are adequately captured during the requirements analysis phase.
Provide input into the secure design of information systems architecture throughout the project lifecycle.
Ensure that access to systems during the project lifecycle by staff, contractors, and vendors is secure and based on the principle of least privilege.
Enforce the implementation and adoption of minimum security baseline standards across all technologies in use.
Facilitate the identification of security vulnerabilities by performing or coordinating security assessments, vulnerability assessments, and penetration testing (VAPT).
Ensure security tools and controls are operating as expected within development and deployment pipelines and review security reports generated from them.
requirements: Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Information Technology, or other STEM-related discipline.
Master’s degree in Information Security, Cyber Security, or related field will be an added advantage.

Professional information security certifications such as CISA, CISM, CISSP, CRISC, or Security+, as well as application/security testing certifications such as CSSLP, CEH, OSCP, CPT, GPEN, GWAPT, or eJPT.
3+ years of experience in technology roles.
1+ years of experience in information security.
jobs.howToApply: Click Here to Apply

requirements: A Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Software Engineering or related field (a Master’s degree in AI/ML or Data Science is strongly preferred), with 12+ years in software engineering or architecture – including at least 6 years designing and leading AI, data or cloud architectures at scale, with demonstrable enterprise / transformation leadership and peoplemanagement experience.

jobs.description: IT Jobs, CIC Insurance Jobs. Looking for an IT job in Kenya? CIC Insurance is hiring a Senior Software Engineer skilled in software development, system integration, and application security.
responsibilities: Design, develop, and maintain responsive web applications using React.js, Next.js, TypeScript, and modern frontend frameworks.
Build reusable UI components, design systems, and frontend architectures that support scalability and maintainability.
Develop and integrate backend APIs and services to deliver seamless end-to-end user experiences.
Design and implement chatbot and conversational AI solutions using Dialogflow, Twilio, and related technologies.
Leverage AI-powered development tools and coding assistants to improve software delivery, code quality, testing, and developer productivity.
Optimize applications for performance, accessibility, SEO, responsiveness, and cross-browser compatibility.
requirements: Bachelor’s Degree in Computer Science, Software Engineering or in a related field
Minimum of 4 years of experience in full stack software development with strong expertise in React.js and Next.js.
Strong knowledge of JavaScript, TypeScript, HTML5, CSS3, and modern frontend development practices.
Experience building scalable frontend architectures, reusable component libraries, and responsive web applications.
Experience integrating frontend applications with REST APIs, GraphQL services, and enterprise systems.

jobs.title: Tech Lead – Messaging Experience Engineering Job Watu Credit
jobs.company: Messaging Experience Engineering Job Watu Credit
jobs.description: IT Jobs, Watu Credit Jobs. Looking for an IT job in Kenya? Watu Credit is hiring a Tech Lead – Messaging Experience Engineering skilled in messaging system architecture, real-time communication protocols, and engineering team leadership.
responsibilities: Own the messaging dispatch layer – SMS, WhatsApp, and FCM. The architecture must support high volume, low latency, and multi-market delivery.

Own the conversational orchestration engine – the in-house logic layer that drives WhatsApp conversations, loan context notifications, payment-via-chat flows, and customer communications. No vendor lock-in on business rules.
Govern the Infobip integration: Infobip is an API provider, not an architecture decision-maker. All flow logic lives in Watu’s systems.
Own delivery reliability – message delivery tracking, retry logic, failure handling, and observability across all channels.
Design for scale across multiple markets with different carrier and channel characteristics.
requirements: Experience building conversational product systems using WhatsApp Business API or similar – not just integration, but flow design and orchestration logic.
Strong hands-on experience with one or several backend languages (Java, Python, Node.js,  …)
Understanding of event-driven messaging systems: Kafka, RabbitMQ, or equivalent at production scale.
Familiarity with SMS gateway integration, delivery optimization, and multi-provider fallback strategies.
Experience designing stateful conversational flows in a microservices architecture.

jobs.title: Tech Lead – Android Experience Engineering Job Watu Credit
jobs.company: Android Experience Engineering Job Watu Credit
jobs.description: IT Jobs, Watu Credit Jobs. Looking for an IT job in Kenya? Watu Credit is hiring a Tech Lead – Android Experience Engineering skilled in Android architecture, team leadership, and mobile experience optimization.
responsibilities: Govern app development: own all architecture decisions, review all PRs, and hold final sign-off on every release. External resources are execution resources, not decision-makers.
Own the BE API that serves the Android app – designed and maintained by this squad, consumed by the app.
Own release process and QA strategy for the Android app – release cadence, feature flag strategy, staged rollout, and rollback procedures.

Own digital experience features delivered through the app – coordinate with the other squads (Device Management Engineering, Payment Engineering, Messaging Engineering, …) for cross squads features and dependencies
Drive the internal mobile engineering capability – the goal over time is to build sufficient internal Android expertise and deliver the best app experience to our clients
requirements: Strong Android development background (Java or Kotlin) – you can review any Android PR raised by developers and know whether it is good and architected/designed in the right away
Experience governing or managing an external mobile development partner – you have been the technical authority over a team that is not your direct report.
Understanding of Android app release management: Play Store submission, staged rollouts, feature flags, crash monitoring.
Experience with mobile API design – REST API design optimized for mobile consumption, offline support, and low-bandwidth environments.
